# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-04840a6c8c4a2b2a3  # Replace with your desired AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro  # Replace with your desired instance type
      KeyName: my-key-pair  # Replace with your key pair name
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - sg-0123456789abcdef0  # Replace with your security group ID
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64Encode: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          sudo yum update -y
          sudo yum install -y httpd
          sudo service httpd start
          sudo chkconfig httpd on

  WebServerVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a  # Replace with your desired availability zone
      Size: 10  # Replace with your desired volume size in GB
      VolumeType: gp2

  WebServerVolumeAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref WebServerInstance
      VolumeId: !Ref WebServerVolume
      Device: /dev/sdf  # Replace with your desired device name
